---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
---

**What problem does this solve?**
Describe the hunting/camera management scenario this would improve.

**Proposed solution**
How you'd like it to work.

**Alternatives considered**
Any workarounds you're currently using.

**Additional context**
Screenshots, mockups, or examples from other apps are welcome.
